title: rubus tenuatispinus
intro: Rubus tenuatispinus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus tenuatispinus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus tenuatispinus are typically made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
